No, the prescription sunglasses is non polarized. Are bifocal sunglasses suitable for outdoor activities like driving? Yes, prescription sunglasses for men are suitable for outdoor activities. The reading glasses part allows you to see the dashboard, while the sunglasses par blocks harsh sunlight, perfectly solving the needs of presbyopia during outdoor activities.
